title: Makefile: cross: add $GOEXE to targets, add windows/arm64 and darwin/arm64 compiles
body: When cross-compiling helpers in the "cross" target, use the target platform's value of GOEXE as a name suffix, and add windows/arm64 and darwin/arm64 to the list of target platforms.

comments.body: FWIW, I'd lean toward basing that decision on whether or not Go (whichever version we're testing with) supports it as a target platform.
Good idea, that’s a good default.
